mxfile.agent: Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Ubuntu; Linux x86_64; rv:148.0) Gecko/20100101 Firefox/148.0

mxCell.value:
Worker
Separate process
Connects MongoDB + Redis
Starts courseProcessorWorker

GET /degree-names (list supported degrees)
GET /scrape-degree (scrape concordia website)
GET /scrape-all-degrees (scrape concordia website)
POST /parse-transcript (PDF → courses + grades)
GET /get-course-schedule (course schedule from Concordia Opendata)

Redis
Redis (two logical DBs)
DB 0 — API Response Cache (TTL 15-30 min)
DB 1 — Job Results Queue / BullMQ (TTL 24h)

cacheGET(ttl)
Redis cache on 2xx GET
15–30 min TTL · DB 0

uploadWithJobId
Multer · disk storage
Saves temp PDF files
